name: Document
author: Finch Team
description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents. Use for any .docx task: reports, memos, letters, templates, tracked changes, or converting content into a polished Word document.

name: Finch Extension Creator
author: Finch Team
description: Guide for developing, debugging, and testing Finch extensions. Use when creating a new extension, adding custom agent tools or composer buttons, or debugging an existing extension.

name: Frontend Design
author: Finch Team
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality — websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts.

name: PDF
author: Finch Team
description: Work with PDF files: read, extract text/tables, merge, split, rotate pages, add watermarks, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt, extract images, and OCR scanned PDFs.

name: Presentation
author: Finch Team
description: Work with PowerPoint files: create slide decks, pitch decks, and presentations; read, edit, combine, or split .pptx files; work with templates, layouts, and speaker notes.

name: Skill Creator
author: Finch Team
description: Create, edit, evaluate, and optimize Finch skills. Includes built-in evals, variance analysis, and tools to benchmark and improve skill trigger accuracy.

name: Theme Factory
author: Finch Team
description: Style artifacts with a theme — slides, docs, reports, HTML landing pages. Choose from 10 pre-set themes with colors and fonts, or generate a custom theme on-the-fly.

name: Spreadsheet
author: Finch Team
description: Work with spreadsheet files (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv): read, edit, add columns, compute formulas, format, chart, clean messy data, or create new spreadsheets from scratch.
